subcodes.first_line: Your letters arrived and, praise be to God, in all matters you have been, and shall ever remain, confirmed and successful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکاتیب شما رسید الحمد لله در جمیع موارد موید و موفق بوده و خواهید بود از خدا
subcodes.subjects: @review of publications, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
